_meta.author: Claude (per Directive v5.8.0→v5.8.5 §2.1)
_meta.description: Capital synset fix: add SOC.official, SOC.city, SPC.place to capital.n.03/n.05/n.06. Resolves systematic capital→STA.wealth misrouting. Synapse v3 had no entries for capital-as-seat-of-government (n.03), capital-as-center (n.05), or capital-as-federal-govt (n.06).
_meta.overlay_order: Base → v3.1 → v3.2 → v3.3 (offer fix) → v3.4 (this)

metadata.rationale: Capital as seat of government directly maps to official/governmental authority
Capital cities are urban centers; city is a core semantic component
Capital is a specific geographic place

metadata.wn_definition: a center that is associated more than any other with some activity or product
metadata.rationale: Center/hub meaning maps to city as urban concentration

metadata.wn_definition: a center that is associated more than any other with some activity or product
metadata.rationale: A center is a place by definition

metadata.wn_definition: the federal government of the United States
metadata.rationale: Federal government is the archetypal official/governmental entity
